requestType.name: General Help Desk Request
requestType.description: Submit a Request or report and issue; fields below are based upon your selection.

content.text: We have assigned your request HEAL-33568 to an appropriate Help Desk team member. They will reach out to you shortly with an update.
I investigated this issue and found the root cause. It requires an Engineering change and will be escalated.

When Product2.Fulfilled_By__c = null on the affected Tirzepatide product (01tRh00000CcKd7IAF) the flow stops at "No Shipping Is Needed". So no ShipStation order, no sstation__ShipStation_Shipment__c record, and no tracking write-back to the Opportunity. The ShipStation path only runs when Fulfilled_By__c IN ('Lacore', 'Davinic')

Needs a tracking write-back mechanism for pharmacy-fulfilled (Wellvi) orders that populates First_Tracking_Num__c, First_Shipping_Company__c, and First_Shipping_Date__c on the linked Opportunity when Wellvi ships.
Any Tirzepatide order for a product with Fulfilled_By__c = null or = 'Pharmacy'; example Opportunity 006Ql00000c867EIAQ, Order 801Ql00000wS0A9IAK
Select the correct type before filling in anything else.
